arguments.argument:
with oPlayer1 { mask_index=sJF_HitBox runAcc=7.7 initialJumpAcc=-7.6 jumpTimeTotal=22 dashRecovery=35 modDashRecharge=0 bCanTakeDamage=1 }
global.pMaxLife=1000 global.pLife=global.pMaxLife oPlayer1.maxLife=global.pMaxLife oPlayer1.life=global.pMaxLife global.bCanGameOver=1 instance_create(0,0,oFinalHUD)
